    G

    GenericLabelParser - Class in dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic
    Default implementation of ILabelParser used by GenericProvider.
    GenericLabelParser() - Constructor for class dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic.GenericLabelParser
    Creates a GenericLabelParser using the default parsing strategy.
    GenericPayloadBuilder - Class in dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic
    Default implementation of IPayloadBuilder used by GenericProvider.
    GenericPayloadBuilder() - Constructor for class dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic.GenericPayloadBuilder
    Creates a GenericPayloadBuilder using the default payload generation strategy.
    GenericProvider - Class in dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic
    A configurable IIssueProvider implementation for interacting with arbitrary issue tracking APIs.
    GenericProvider(String, String, String) - Constructor for class dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic.GenericProvider
    Constructs a new GenericProvider with the specified repository context and authentication token.
    GenericProvider.Builder - Class in dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.generic
    Builder used to construct GenericProvider instances.
    getContract() - Method in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.core.IssueReporter
    Returns the label contract.
    getDiagnostics() - Static method in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.utils.DeviceUtils
    Returns a formatted string containing environment diagnostics, including operating system name, architecture, and Java runtime information.
    getProvider() - Method in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.core.IssueReporter
    Returns the underlying provider
    getRequiredLabels() - Method in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.core.LabelContract
    Returns all required label names.
    GITHUB - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.IssueProviderType
    GitHub issue provider.
    githubDefault() - Static method in class dk.tij.jissuesystem.core.LabelContract
    Returns the default GitHub contract.
    GitHubLabelParser - Class in dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github
    Utility class for parsing GitHub label JSON responses.
    GitHubLabelParser() - Constructor for class dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github.GitHubLabelParser
    Creates a new GitHubLabelParser instance.
    GitHubPayloadBuilder - Class in dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github
    Builds JSON payloads for creating GitHub issues via the repository_dispatch event.
    GitHubProvider - Class in dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github
    GitHub issue provider implementation for the IIssueProvider interface.
    GitHubProvider(String, String, String) - Constructor for class dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider.github.GitHubProvider
    Constructs a GitHubProvider for the given repository and access token.
